registration.proposal_source: idea-engine control/outbox.md @ main 1218196 (landed via idea-engine PR #353)
registration.verdict: VERDICT 059 (INTAKE 048; INTAKE number = proposal number per the P047->V058 offset map)

b1.note: b1 = 3/4 - EPS, used at s in {1,2}

model.switching_rule: RANDOM: at each step play A with probability 1/2, else B (independent per step); effective win probability at residue s is w_s = (a + b_s)/2
model.reduced_chain_rule: on residues s in {0,1,2}: from s go to (s+1) mod 3 w.p. w_s (win, capital +1) and to (s-1) mod 3 w.p. 1 - w_s (loss, capital -1)
model.drift_formula: D = sum_s pi_s * (2*w_s - 1), pi the chain's stationary distribution (exact rationals)

decision_rule.INVALID: iff an isolated-loss gate fails (D_A >= 0 or D_B >= 0) — the 'two LOSING games' premise is void; report, do not rule
decision_rule.APPROVE: iff D_mix >= 1/1000 AND the seed-20261332 stability leg reproduces the sign and the >= 1/1000 margin
decision_rule.NULL: iff 0 < D_mix < 1/1000, OR any validity conjunct fails (an Arm B leg disagrees with Arm A beyond 4*se)
decision_rule.armB_tolerance: abs(empirical_drift - exact_drift) <= 4 * se, se = sqrt((1 - empirical_drift^2) / N)

seeds.20261329: Arm B headline: random-switch mixed drift, N = 200000; PASS iff |D_hat_mix - D_mix| <= 4*se
seeds.20261330: Arm B control: pure Game A, N = 200000; confirms D_hat_A ~ -1/50 (A-losing precondition, live)
seeds.20261331: Arm B control: pure Game B, N = 200000; confirms D_hat_B ~ D_B < 0 (B-losing precondition, live)
seeds.20261332: stability leg: re-run the mixed headline at a second seed; PASS iff the sign and the >= 1/1000 margin both reproduce
seeds.policy: exactly these four, pre-registered in PROPOSAL 048, strictly above the V058 high-water 20261328; no other RNG constructed

arm_B.draw_order: mixed legs: 2 draws per step in pinned order (draw 1: policy coin, rng.random() < 1/2 -> play A; draw 2: win coin, rng.random() < p_win); pure legs: 1 draw per step (win coin only)

reporting_only.stationary_residue_distributions: pi_B and pi_mix (exhibit the ratchet mechanism); never gate the ruling

periodic_comparator.rule: deterministic [A,A,B,B] cycle on the phase x residue product chain (12 states: phase p in 0..3 advances +1 mod 4 every step; residue s moves +-1 mod 3 with win prob a if pattern[p] == 'A' else b_s); drift = sum over states of pi * (2*w - 1); reporting-only

drafter_disclosed_reference.note: NON-authoritative drafting-time hand check disclosed in the idea doc; the sim re-derives everything from the pinned constants above and must not trust these — equality is reported, never gated

environment.hermetic: the runner reads only this fixtures.json; zero repo/network reads at verdict time; stdlib only; no wall-clock in any output
